audit_items.proof_trace: CloneKernelInfo() can return NULL on memory allocation failure but ExpandRotateKernelInfo() passes the unchecked result directly to RotateKernelInfo() and SameKernelInfo(), both of which immediately dereference the parameter causing segmentation fault.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker exhausts system memory to trigger CloneKernelInfo() allocation failure, causing NULL dereference in subsequent function calls leading to denial of service crash.
